zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wentworth於大約1290年出生在英國越可爾溫特沃思 伍德豪斯時，他的父親John Wentworth2歲，母親Joan le Tyes5歲。他於大約1329年與Joane Bissett結婚。他去世於大約1360年在他的家鄉享年72歲。

nameMeanings.name: Wentworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Wentworth in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wintra + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
habitational name from Wentworth in Cambridgeshire, which has the same etymology as the placename in 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Wentworth was born about 1290, in Wentworth Woodhouse, Yorkshire, England, his father, John Wentworth, was 2 and his mother, Joan le Tyes, was 5. He married Joane Bissett about 1329. He died about 1360, in his hometown, at the age of 72.

ko.North Elmsall, West Yorkshire, England,: 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 노르스 엘사
ko.lifeSummary: John Wentworth(이)가 대략 1290년 영국 요르크실르 웬트워스 우드하우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wentworth(은)는 2세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan le Tyes(은)는 5세였다. 그는 대략 1329년 Joane Bissett(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 대략 1360년 그의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Joane Bissett aproximadamente 1329. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1360, em sua cidade natal, com 72 anos.

ru.North Elmsall, West Yorkshire, England,: норт элмсалл, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wentworth родился около 1290 г. в местности вентворт вудхоус, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Wentworth было 2 года, а матери, которую звали Joan le Tyes, 5. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Bissett около 1329 г. Он умер около 1360 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 72 лет.
